title: HP Multi-Model Network BOF Series — CVE-2022-28721 / CVE-2023-1329 / CVE-2024-0794
product: HP DeskJet / ENVY / OfficeJet / LaserJet Pro / PageWide / DesignJet / Workpath MFP
versions_affected: Multiple models — see HP PSIRT advisories HPSBPI03810, HPSBPI03863, HPSBPI03951
author: André Henrique (@mrhenrike) | União Geek
description: Three related buffer overflow vulnerabilities in HP consumer and enterprise printers (DeskJet, ENVY, OfficeJet, LaserJet Pro, PageWide, DesignJet, Workpath MFP). CVE-2022-28721: network BOF in rendering subsystem (CVSS 9.8). CVE-2023-1329: BOF in HP Workpath platform affecting 1914 MFP models (CVSS 9.8). CVE-2024-0794: BOF in PDF font rendering path allowing unauthenticated RCE via a specially crafted print job (CVSS 9.8). All three share the same attack vector: a malformed document sent over the network triggers a stack or heap overflow leading to arbitrary code execution.
